title: Flip String to Monotone Increasing
titleCn: 将字符串翻转到单调递增

testcases.input: s = "00110" Output: 1 Explanation: We flip the last digit to get 00111.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We flip the last digit to get 00111.

testcases.input: s = "010110" Output: 2 Explanation: We flip to get 011111, or alternatively 000111.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: We flip to get 011111, or alternatively 000111.
